outcome.summary: Independent four-eyes review of GOV-005 complete: design coherent and authority-preserving but not yet safely enforceable; 1 HIGH and 4 MEDIUM confirmed defects, verified controls, and residual risks recorded. Reviewer recommendation CHANGES_REQUIRED (advisory).

acceptance_criteria.name: AC4 Product Owner authority explicit and non-delegable

changes.purpose: Register the Claude review task entry only (authorized review registration).
changes.ownership_expansion_reason: Review registration is explicitly authorized by the review packet; only the GOV-005-CLAUDE entry was appended, the GOV-005 entry was not modified.

validation.name: PR governance check
validation.evidence: does not run the GOV-005 validator (CF-1)

validation.name: GOV-005 governance validator
validation.evidence: PyYAML not installed in review environment; no dependency install permitted

deviations: Repository governance validator could not run locally (PyYAML absent; no install permitted); recorded SKIPPED and CI status used instead.
No correction applied to implementation-owned paths; per four-eyes rule, corrections recorded for ChatGPT to apply with assigned ownership.

impacts.architecture: No product architecture or runtime change; independent governance review only.
impacts.security: Contract security is sound (Product Owner authority, approval-gating, inactive Hermes, no secrets), but enforcement is weakened until the validator gates the PR (CF-1).
impacts.integration: GOV-005 precedes ARCH-001 (PR #9); ARCH-001 must resynchronize after merge.
impacts.residual_risk: Until CF-1 is fixed, drift (CF-2/CF-3) can re-enter undetected; pure-file validation cannot verify git head or changed-file ownership.

decisions_required: Q1: Accept the one-time codex/ branch-namespace exception (disclosed in registry).
Q2: Require the GOV-005 validator in CI before merge, or merge with tracked fast-follow.
Q3: Choose the single canonical task-status source and cross-artifact mapping.
Product Owner merge decision for GOV-005.
recommended_next_action: ChatGPT triages CF-1..CF-5 on the implementation branch and the Product Owner decides Q1-Q3 and merge; do not merge until CF-1 disposition and finding resolution are agreed.
